stealth_dso.owner_identity: Dr. Michael Bubon (founder/majority owner, Bubon Orthodontics LLC); co-owners Dr. Loretoni and Dr. Rozny; Chicago/Sheffield Ave location associated with Dr. Henry Schuppert
stealth_dso.reasoning: This is a tier REVERSAL resolving the 'adjudication_hold_dso_verify' flag. The live site (www.diamondplusortho.com) and further research reveal the location has become part of a real multi-location corporate structure: an NLRB case (13-CA-314078, Region 13/Chicago) names the legal employer/respondent as 'Diamond Plus Orthodontics by Bubon Orthodontics LLC'; a Yelp listing titles the location 'DIAMOND PLUS ORTHODONTICS, PART OF THE BUBON ORTHODONTICS FAMILY'; and diamondplusortho.com content is now served through Bubon's shared web platform alongside Bubon's ~14 Wisconsin locations. Bubon Orthodontics LLC (founded 1993 by Dr. Michael Bubon, co-owned with Dr. Loretoni/Dr. Rozny) operates roughly 15 locations across WI/IL under multiple retained local brand names (Bubon in WI, Diamond Plus in Chicago) -- a real MSO/management-company structure sitting behind the retained local 'Diamond Plus'/Schuppert name, meeting the T4 bar. No PE sponsor was found in available sources (practice describes itself as one of the nation's largest privately-owned ortho practices), so pe_backed=false. Confidence medium: the corporate-parent fact is documentary (NLRB filing + Yelp brand-family listing) but Henry Schuppert's current personal ownership stake (if any) in the combined entity could not be independently confirmed. | verify-upheld: Loaded the NLRB case page directly, which confirms the respondent/employer of record is literally named "Diamond Plus Orthodontics by Bubon Orthodontics LLC" (Chicago, IL) — direct documentary evidence of a corporate-parent structure, not mere brand-substring. I also loaded bubonortho.com directly and confirmed its Illinois locator lists a "Lakeview" location, and a follow-up search pinned that entry's address as 2835 N Sheffield Ave #405, Chicago IL 60657 — an exact-address match to the Diamond Plus Sheffield Ave listing — satisfying the locator-match bar for stealth_dso. Search snippets further show diamondplusortho.com's live page title now reads "Bubon Orthodontics: #1 Orthodontist in WI & IL," confirming the site has been reskinned onto Bubon's shared platform, and counter-searches for "Bubon Orthodontics" + DSO/PE/MSO/acquired turned up no private-equity sponsor, consistent with pe_backed=false; owner bios (Michael Bubon founded 1993, Loretoni-Rozny and Michael Rozny co-owners since 2011) also check out. Direct fetch of diamondplusortho.com and the Yelp page failed (SSL handshake block / 403), but their content was corroborated via independent search snippets, so evidence is sound though not every URL was fetched first-hand — medium confidence as claimed is appropriate.

MINT operated a branded location at this exact address (15 N Wolf Rd, Northlake, IL 60164) under 'MINT dentistry - Northlake' (own subdomain northlake.mintdentistry.com, Facebook page, TikTok grand-opening video) -- the registered legal name 'Chicago Metro Dental Services, PLLC' masks the patient-facing MINT brand, textbook branded-DSO structure. I additionally loaded gotu.com's DSO directory page directly, which independently confirms MINT dentistry is "one of the fastest-growing DSOs" with 140+ locations across 9 states (including Illinois) operating under a named management company ("Saint Apollonia management group") founded by Dr. Field Harrison — this is stronger MSO-structure evidence than the original claim cited, and no PE sponsor was found for MINT in counter-searches, consistent with pe_backed:false. institutional.reasoning: The org NPI (1194497081) and mailing address (416 E Roosevelt Rd Ste 102, Wheaton) match exactly the Chicago Dental Society Foundation Dental Clinic -- a 501(c)3 nonprofit, the philanthropic arm of the Chicago Dental Society, described by CDS itself as 'the only dental foundation that owns and operates a clinic in Illinois run by all volunteer dentists', providing free basic dental care to low-income DuPage/Cook/Lake county residents. The Data-Axle 'website' field (ardendentalcenter.com) points to an unrelated for-profit practice at a different suite (531 E Roosevelt Rd Ste 100) and appears to be a data-linkage error, not evidence against institutional status.

Oak Park River Forest Infant Welfare Society is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit (confirmed via GuideStar) operating the 'IWS Children's Clinic,' a low/no-cost pediatric medical-dental clinic serving underserved children since 1916, at 320 Lake St / 28 Madison St, Oak Park. This is a nonprofit community health clinic -- squarely institutional (T6). The source unit's website field ('doctors.advocatehealth.com') does not match the verified nonprofit's own domain (oprfiws.org), but the institutional classification does not depend on that field.

Address 1431 N Western Ave Ste 401, Chicago 60622 exactly matches PrimeCare Health's 'West Town Oral Health Center,' a federally qualified health center (FQHC) located inside the AMITA Health Saint Elizabeth Medical Office Building. Pandya, DDS -- matching this record's practice_name exactly -- as a dental provider there. This record's primary_npi (1659485225) is oddly attributed by Data Axle/NPPES to a different individual, Odilia Navarrete, DDS, whose own independently-listed practice address (5708 W Fullerton Ave) does not match this location, likely a Data Axle NPI-attribution error -- but the location itself is unambiguously an Erie Family Health Center FQHC clinic, not an independent practice.

Heartland Health Outreach is a nonprofit community health program operating under Heartland Alliance Health, providing sliding-scale/Medicaid dental services to underserved populations at 2418 W Division St. This is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit health-center operation (documented on heartlandalliance.org and the Community Health Center Chronicles), not a private dental practice -- fits institutional (FQHC-like nonprofit).

The address (1701 W Superior St, Chicago, IL 60622) and phone number ((312) 666-3494) in this unit exactly match Erie Family Health Centers' 'West Town' location — a federally qualified health center (FQHC) nonprofit operating dental services alongside medical/behavioral care. This address (9718 S Halsted St, Chicago, IL 60628) and phone number ((773) 233-4100) match exactly to Christian Community Health Center's dental clinic, a nonprofit sliding-scale community health center (per cchc-online.org direct fetch and freedentalcare.us). Dr. Fatima Saaduddin (the NPI on file) and 'Salazar Roger DMD' are staff dentists at this FQHC network location, not independent owners; the unit's own website field ('Doctors.Advocatehealth.Com') is likely a Data-Axle directory-aggregator artifact rather than true Advocate Health ownership, but either interpretation (FQHC or hospital-system-affiliated) lands in the institutional tier.
